directive: Design and implement a dedicated daily provider drift workflow for live upstream endpoint verification against an expected response matrix, using limited-budget provider secrets, with deduplicated GitHub issue creation on true drift. Reuse/repair existing live_upstream_smoke and stale provider-drift workflow where sensible, add tests/docs, and keep release/nightly non-blocking.

children.label: runtime-matrix
children.description: Inspect and extend the Rust live upstream smoke/drift test surface. Define or add a checked-in expectation matrix and determine the minimal viable assertions for provider-specific endpoint drift (not just round-trip OK), plus tests or validation around the matrix parsing/execution path.

children.label: workflow-issueing
children.description: Inspect and repair/replace the stale provider-drift GitHub Actions workflow. Design the daily control-plane workflow, issue dedupe/update behavior, artifact/log strategy, and docs. Implement the workflow and any helper scripts/files needed for issue creation/reporting without making release/nightly blocking.

children.label: runtime-matrix

children.description: Inspect and repair/replace the stale provider-drift GitHub Actions workflow. children.label: workflow-issueing

plan.rationale: Separate the live endpoint verification mechanics from the GitHub Actions orchestration and issue lifecycle so drift semantics are defined once and the workflow becomes a thin runner.
